description_long: This object consists of a stack of four hardcover books, with the top book partially open to reveal its pages. The covers are a dark, muted green with a slightly glossy finish and show signs of wear along the edges, giving them a vintage or well-used appearance. The top book's cover features faint gold-embossed text, while the rest of the covers are plain. The pages are thick and slightly yellowed, suggesting age or high-quality paper. The spines are simple, matching the cover color, and show no visible text or decorative elements. There are no visible illustrations or artwork on the covers, and the overall design is minimalistic and utilitarian.
description: A stack of four vintage, dark green hardcover books with worn edges and a glossy finish, the top book partially open to reveal yellowed pages. The covers are plain except for faint gold-embossed text on the top book.
description_view_0: Front view showing the stack of books with the top book closed, displaying the gold-embossed text on the cover.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the books and the partially open top book, revealing the pages' texture and color.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back covers of the books, with the top book open and the rest stacked neatly beneath.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the open top book and the worn edges of the covers, with the gold-embossed text faintly visible.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is dark green and plain, with no visible text or decorative elements. The edges show some wear, but there are no patterns or illustrations.
